summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Drilling Campaign Cost Estimator app iteration 2. All new features working correctly: data validation, DRM-encrypted file handling, and end-to-end estimation workflow. 18 backend tests passed, all UI tests passed.
seed_data_creation: None - existing processed data in /app/data/processed/ used
context_for_next_testing_agent: Streamlit app running on port 8501. All 5 pages tested and working: Upload Data (file uploader with validation section), Build Artifacts (DRM-encrypted labels for 3 files, 62 processed artifacts), WBS Tree (tree visualization with DARAJAT field), Modelling (CALCULATE DRILLING COST produces results: Total 27.90 MM USD), Audit (shows info when no result). Data validation logic tested with 11 unit tests covering dashboard/primary workbook contracts, missing sheets/headers detection, CSV validation. Estimation engine tested with 7 unit tests covering artifact existence, estimate_campaign function with SLK field.

test_data_validation.py.TestDataValidationContracts: 3 tests PASSED - dashboard contract sheets, minimum viable contracts, dashboard minimum sheets
test_data_validation.py.TestExcelValidation: 4 tests PASSED - valid dashboard workbook, missing sheets, missing headers, unknown workbook
test_data_validation.py.TestCSVValidation: 2 tests PASSED - valid CSV, empty CSV

test_estimation_engine.py.TestEstimationEngine: 5 tests PASSED - processed artifacts exist, required artifacts present, estimate_campaign function exists, build_validation_artifacts, estimate_campaign_slk_field

ui_tests.navigation: PASS - All 5 pages accessible via sidebar navigation
ui_tests.upload_data_page: PASS - File uploader, supported formats (xlsx, xls, csv), Currently loaded raw files (5 files)
ui_tests.build_artifacts_page: PASS - DRM-encrypted labels (3 files), 62 existing processed artifacts, Pipeline Configuration, BUILD ARTIFACTS button
ui_tests.wbs_tree_page: PASS - WBS TREE VALIDATION header, Field selector (DARAJAT), Campaign tier selector, WBS Flowchart visualization
ui_tests.modelling_page: PASS - Campaign Inputs sidebar, CALCULATE DRILLING COST button, estimation results (Total 27.90 MM USD, Well-linked 14,433,476 USD, Campaign-tied 13,470,935 USD)
ui_tests.audit_page: PASS - AUDIT OUTPUT header, info message when no result

features_verified.data_validation: PASS - Data contract validation logic correctly identifies Dashboard workbook type (Structured.Cost + General.Camp.Data sheets)
features_verified.drm_handling: PASS - DRM-encrypted files labeled on Build Artifacts page (3 files: WBS_Dictionary, WBS_Data, WBS Reference)
features_verified.estimation_workflow: PASS - End-to-end workflow from processed artifacts to estimation results working
features_verified.wbs_tree: PASS - Tree visualization loads from processed artifacts
